title: codereview-P3: incomplete update to DAD collision section and missing test vector ref in 02-physical-link.md
description: After updating short_addr computation at :199, the Collision Detection and Resolution sections (lines 222-240) still assume old increment-candidate logic; should reference new retry-with-seed strategy. Add cross-ref to test/vectors/ for DAD collision cases (similar to ccp15.json). Also update appendix-design-rationale.md if needed. Tagged codereview. Part of 3-pass requirement for project-LICHEN-b6zw. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-b6zw
close_reason: Fixed incomplete update by expanding retry pseudocode, updating collision resolution tie-in, adding test/vectors cross-ref and line refs in spec/02-physical-link.md. Collision section now consistent. Part of 3 codereview for project-LICHEN-b6zw.
